rule_details: No extra columns present in either raw file. Feature surface locked to prompt schema only.
One duplicated H4 close_time pair on 2017-09-06; both rows retained because no duplicate open_time and no synthetic repair allowed. This affects warmup only.
19 H4 rows have close_time not exactly 4 hours after open_time; rows retained and supplied close_time governs slower-feature visibility. No bar repair or synthetic normalization performed.
8 H4 rows precede gaps >4h. Missing bars are not invented. Execution uses actual next available open as supplied.
One H4 zero-activity row at 2017-09-06 16:00 UTC retained; it lies in warmup only and is logged.

On overlapping complete UTC days with six H4 bars, native D1 and aggregated native H4 match exactly within floating-point tolerance for OHLCV and trade fields. Incomplete H4 days are logged separately, not repaired.
